# Assessment Overview

Supplementary assessment facts available for this report:

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level and component-level architecture diagrams with technology summary.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - Dependency map grouped by functional category and test dependency inventory.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint inventory, communication patterns, and sequence diagram.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Database configuration, entity relationships, repository methods, and data boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, properties, secrets, and runtime/version inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core business workflows, domain mapping, rules, and workflow sequence diagram.
